---
description: Initialize a new project with the copilot template — auto-detects tech stack and fills placeholders
agent: Planner
argument-hint: Target project path (optional)
---

Use the **initialize-project** skill to set up a new project with this template.

Pass the user's input (if any) as the target project path. If no input is provided, the skill will ask.

All detection steps, copy rules, and guardrails are defined in the skill — follow them exactly.
